issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. The effect requires: (1) look at top 3 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 Navy type card other than Brannew, (3) add it to hand, (4) trash the rest. Current DSL uses generic SearchDeck with no filter, count limit, or trash mechanic.
Filter is 'Any' but should specify Navy type cards and exclude Brannew by name.
Missing second action to trash remaining cards. Effect requires sequential actions: search/reveal, then trash.
